meta-description: Learn about in person assistance personnel programs by reviewing the definition in the HealthCare.gov Glossary.
title: In Person Assistance Personnel Program
excerpt: Individuals or organizations that are trained and able to provide help to consumers, small businesses, and their employees as they look for health coverage options through the Marketplace, including helping them complete eligibility and enrollment forms. These individuals and organizations are required to be unbiased. Their services are free to consumers.
meta-title: In Person Assistance Personnel Program - Glossary
